title: Debug and fix cross-tenant PubSub leak
prompt: A fintech team reports that users in Org A are occasionally seeing notifications about transactions from Org B. The code uses Phoenix.PubSub.broadcast(MyApp.PubSub, "transactions", {:transaction, txn}) and Phoenix.PubSub.subscribe(MyApp.PubSub, "transactions"). Produce lib/my_app_web/live/transactions_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.TransactionsLive) that fixes the leak: (1) scope the topic by org "transactions:org:#{org_id}", (2) update the broadcast site to use the same scoped topic, (3) add a defensive check in handle_info: if txn.org_id != socket.assigns.scope.org_id, ignore, (4) add on_mount {MyAppWeb.UserAuth, :ensure_authenticated}, (5) connected?/1 before subscribe. Three defense layers are required.
tier_rationale: Race/scoping bug that has been seen in production. Requires multi-layer defense including a consumer-side check.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes phoenix-thinking: 'Unscoped topics leak data between tenants'
